items.title: Runtime can construct a Tushare provider
items.description: App settings and provider wiring support source_provider=tushare with explicit token-based configuration.

items.title: Tushare snapshot fields map into current sync contract
items.description: The provider maps Tushare stock_basic/trade_cal/daily/daily_basic/stk_limit fields into MarketDataSnapshot and current sync expectations.

items.title: Tushare capital sidecars feed the current analysis path
items.description: The provider normalizes moneyflow/top_list/moneyflow_hsgt into capital-feature sidecars, source watermark fields, and market overview highlights that the current analysis sync can consume without new tables.

items.title: Default fixture-based smoke still passes
items.description: The new Tushare path does not break the existing fixture_json-based development loop or app smoke.
